news.t: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF

holdings.infoBox: CGVV is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 4.37%, Intel at 4.37%, Alphabet at 3.76%, Starbucks at 3.30%, and Applied Materials at 3.05%.

overview.description: The Capital Group U.S. Large Value ETF (CGVV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in US equities. It specifically targets undervalued large-cap companies representing good, long-term investment opportunities. CGVV was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF
data.text: The $66B ETF manager has grown its total suite of ETFs to 25 in the U.S., with registered investment advisors comprising a fifth of its overall ETF business LOS ANGELES , June 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ --...
